judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wanted to find apartments in Ohio City with three specific amenities: parking, a fitness center, and an elevator. Success would mean navigating to apartments.com, applying the correct filters for location and all three amenities, and returning relevant results.

**Output Assessment:** The agent successfully navigated to apartments.com, applied all three required filters (Parking, Fitness Center, Elevator) for Ohio City in Cleveland, OH, and returned 301 results. It provided 6 specific listings with names, addresses, pricing, and amenities. The filtered URL was also shared: https://www.apartments.com/ohio-city-cleveland-oh/parking-fitness-center-elevator/

**Evidence:** The execution trace clearly supports task completion: Step 3 shows the agent landed on Ohio City listings; Steps 6, 8, and 11 show each of the three filters being clicked (Parking, Fitness Center, Elevator); Step 9 shows expanding "Show All Amenities" to access the Elevator option; Step 13 shows clicking "See 301 Results" to confirm the filtered search. All steps returned OK status, execution_integrity_status is "healthy," and the final listings all include the required amenities. The URL format itself encodes all three filters correctly.

**Summary:** The agent correctly navigated to apartments.com, applied all three required amenity filters for the Ohio City neighborhood, and returned 301 matching listings with supporting detail. The execution trace confirms each filter was explicitly clicked and the results page was loaded successfully.
